who: procurement managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts biweekly
offer: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts biweekly, missed contract renewals cause service disruptions. We provide timely reminders instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Missed contract renewals leading to service disruptions
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Indie Hackers discussions about contract management
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for procurement tools
try_it: Let users try biweekly reminder notifications on 1-3 contracts
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick use
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing contract data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
